svg.title: Legacy Spec Factory x Atlas Engineering Delivery Hub v2
svg.desc: A dark sci-fi dashboard infographic showing enterprise RAG and module-first Legacy Spec Factory feeding an approved capability package and Atlas engineering delivery.
svg.text: No Output, No Pass. No Pass, No Next.
LEGACY SPEC FACTORY x ATLAS ENGINEERING DELIVERY HUB
RAG-GROUNDED MODULE FLOWS TO APPROVED CAPABILITY PACKAGE TO CLOUD-NATIVE DELIVERY

g.text: LEGACY SPEC FACTORY / 旧系统理解工厂
RAG 证据层 + 模块四视图，形成证据驱动的 BRD
ENTERPRISE RAG / 企业知识图谱
以模块场景和四条 Flow 为骨架，Program / Flow 可作为分析起点
BRD / spec.yaml / traceability / SDD handoff / open questions
Seven Mountains SDLC x Seven Gates，ATLAS 工程交付中枢
把旧系统变成可理解的知识
Turn complex legacy systems into clear artifacts
让 RAG 证据可行动
Hydrate flows with snippets and field meaning
从 BRD 平滑接入 Atlas SDD
Approved BRD to structured SDD without guesswork
用七道门保障高质量交付
Controls, validation, and traceability at every step
